title: Cardinal Health honors top clinical laboratory professionals
text: DUBLIN, Ohio , April 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Cardinal Health (NYSE: CAH) today announced the winners and honorees of its annual Lab Excellence List, which names top clinical laboratory professionals making significant contributions to health care and patient outcomes through their research, diagnosis, innovation or advocacy. The list is part of celebrations surrounding the industry's annual Medical Laboratory Professionals Week, a more than 40-year-long tradition that celebrates lab professionals across all of health care.

title: Cardinal Health to Webcast Discussion of Third-Quarter Results for Fiscal Year 2022 on May 5
text: DUBLIN, Ohio , April 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Cardinal Health (NYSE: CAH) plans to release third-quarter financial results for its fiscal year 2022 on May 5 prior to the opening of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. The company will webcast a discussion of these results beginning at 8:30 a.m.
